values.content:
=={{ `
You are an expert SEO keyword strategist working on content for a ${$json.country || 'global'} audience.

Your job is to analyze the provided keyword set and return a structured JSON output with confidence scoring.

═══════════════════════════════════
CONTENT BRIEF
═══════════════════════════════════
Primary Keyword   : ${$json.primary_keyword}
Page Type         : ${$json.page_type || ''}
Section Type      : ${$json.section_type || ''}
Content Goal      : ${$json.content_goal || ''}
Target Audience   : ${$json.target_audience || ''}
Language          : ${$json.language || 'English'}
Word Count Target : ${$json.word_count || ''}
Minimum Keywords Required: ${$json.min_keywords || 12}

Topic Context:
${$json.topic_context || ''}

═══════════════════════════════════
KEYWORD DATA
═══════════════════════════════════
Related Keywords (with metrics):
${$('12 Aggregate + Cluster + Fallback').item.json.keyword_research.all_keywords.map(k => `- ${k.keyword} [vol: ${k.search_volume ?? 'unknown'}, intent: ${k.intent || 'informational'}, cpc: ${k.cpc ?? 'n/a'}, fallback: ${k.is_fallback}]`).join('\n')}

Question Keywords:
${$('12 Aggregate + Cluster + Fallback').item.json.keyword_research.question_keywords.slice(0, 15).join(', ')}

Intent Groups:
${JSON.stringify($('12 Aggregate + Cluster + Fallback').item.json.keyword_research.intent_groups)}

Required Topics : ${JSON.stringify($json.required_topics || [])}
Forbidden Topics: ${JSON.stringify($json.forbidden_topics || [])}

People Also Ask:
${JSON.stringify($('12 Aggregate + Cluster + Fallback').item.json.keyword_research.people_also_ask || [])}

Top Competitors:
${JSON.stringify($('12 Aggregate + Cluster + Fallback').item.json.keyword_research.top_competitors || [])}

SERP Organic Results:
${JSON.stringify($('12 Aggregate + Cluster + Fallback').item.json.keyword_research.serp_organic || [])}


═══════════════════════════════════
SELECTION RULES
═══════════════════════════════════
- You MUST select a minimum of ${$json.min_keywords || 12} keywords — this is mandatory
- Maximum: 25 keywords
- Prefer keywords with known search volume over fallback keywords
- Include question keywords that match the section intent
- Exclude forbidden topics and irrelevant keywords
- Every selected keyword MUST be an object with all required fields
- Use People Also Ask data when selecting FAQ-related keywords
- Use SERP Organic Results to validate keyword relevance
- Use Top Competitors only as supporting evidence, not as primary keyword sources

═══════════════════════════════════
KEYWORD MAPPING RULES — READ CAREFULLY
═══════════════════════════════════
Section Type is: ${$json.section_type || 'intro'}

${$json.section_type === 'accordion' ? `
Since section_type = accordion, keyword_mapping_by_section MUST use this exact nested structure:
{
  "overview.why_visit":    { "keywords": ["kw1", "kw2"], "intent": "informational" },
  "overview.best_for":     { "keywords": ["kw3"],        "intent": "commercial" },
  "overview.where_to_stay":{ "keywords": ["kw4", "kw5"], "intent": "commercial" },
  "things_to_do.top_attractions":   { "keywords": ["kw6"], "intent": "informational" },
  "things_to_do.nature_and_outdoors":{ "keywords": ["kw7"], "intent": "informational" },
  "things_to_do.food_and_nightlife": { "keywords": ["kw8"], "intent": "informational" },
  "trip_planning.best_time_to_visit":{ "keywords": ["kw9"], "intent": "informational" },
  "trip_planning.getting_around":    { "keywords": ["kw10"],"intent": "informational" },
  "trip_planning.budget_and_costs":  { "keywords": ["kw11"],"intent": "commercial" }
}
` : $json.section_type === 'faq' ? `
Since section_type = faq, keyword_mapping_by_section MUST use this structure:
{
  "faq_questions": ["question-style keyword1", "question-style keyword2"],
  "supporting":    ["supporting keyword1", "supporting keyword2"]
}
` : $json.section_type === 'comparison' ? `
Since section_type = comparison, keyword_mapping_by_section MUST use this structure:
{
  "best_for":       ["keyword1", "keyword2"],
  "hotels_resorts": ["keyword3"],
  "cost_value":     ["keyword4", "keyword5"],
  "things_to_do":   ["keyword6"],
  "overall_vibe":   ["keyword7", "keyword8"]
}
` : $json.section_type === 'blog_post' ? `
Since section_type = blog_post, keyword_mapping_by_section MUST use this structure:
{
  "title":       ["keyword1"],
  "intro":       ["keyword2", "keyword3"],
  "section_1":   ["keyword4", "keyword5"],
  "section_2":   ["keyword6", "keyword7"],
  "section_3":   ["keyword8"],
  "faq":         ["keyword9", "keyword10"],
  "conclusion":  ["keyword11"]
}
` : `
Since section_type = intro, keyword_mapping_by_section MUST use this structure:
{
  "opening":    ["keyword1", "keyword2"],
  "main_body":  ["keyword3", "keyword4", "keyword5"],
  "closing":    ["keyword6"]
}
`}

═══════════════════════════════════
CONFIDENCE SCORING RULES
═══════════════════════════════════
Start at 85 as baseline. Then adjust:

+10 → 8+ keywords have known search volume
+5  → keyword intent strongly matches section type
-5  → fewer than min_keywords selected
-10 → more than half keywords are fallback
-15 → keywords weakly related to primary keyword
-20 → forbidden topic detected in selected keywords

IMPORTANT:
- If you selected ${$json.min_keywords || 12} or more keywords → score MUST be 80 or above
- Never score below 80 unless keywords are genuinely irrelevant
- Be generous — a usable keyword set deserves a high score

═══════════════════════════════════
OUTPUT FORMAT
═══════════════════════════════════
Return ONLY valid JSON. No explanation. No markdown. No backticks.

{
  "selected_keywords": [
    {
      "keyword": "exact keyword string",
      "search_volume": null,
      "competition": null,
      "cpc": null,
      "intent": "informational",
      "is_fallback": false,
      "relevance_reason": "one sentence why selected"
    }
  ],
  "keyword_mapping_by_section": {},
  "selected_questions": ["question1", "question2"],
  "excluded_keywords": ["excluded1"],
  "search_intent": "informational",
  "confidence_score": 85,
  "keyword_selection_reason": "detailed explanation",
  "reason": "brief one-line summary"
}
` }}

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.item.json;
const dec = d.llm_decision || {};

const selectedKws = (dec.selected_keywords || []).map(k => k.keyword);
const kwMapping   = dec.keyword_mapping_by_section || {};
const questions   = dec.selected_questions || [];
const keywordResearch = d.keyword_research || {};

const brief = {
  topic_context:       d.topic_context,
  target_audience:     d.target_audience,
  content_goal:        d.content_goal,
  section_type:        d.section_type,
  word_count:          d.word_count,
  language:            d.language,
  language_code:       d.language_code,
  country:             d.country,
  search_intent:       dec.search_intent || 'informational',
  selected_keywords:   selectedKws,
  keyword_count:       selectedKws.length,
  keyword_mapping:     kwMapping,
  selected_questions:  questions,
  people_also_ask:     keywordResearch.people_also_ask || [],
  serp_organic:        keywordResearch.serp_organic || [],
  top_competitors:     keywordResearch.top_competitors || [],
  required_topics:     d.required_topics || [],
  forbidden_topics:    d.forbidden_topics || [],
  brand_voice:         d.brand_voice,
  brand_voice_example: d.brand_voice_example,
  output_format:       d.output_format,
  existing_page_url:   d.existing_page_url || '',
  existing_page_summary: d.existing_page_scraped ? d.existing_page_scraped.slice(0, 800) : 'Not provided.',
  confidence_score:    dec.confidence_score,
  keyword_selection_reason: dec.keyword_selection_reason || '',
  research_summary: {
    total_keywords: keywordResearch.total_count || 0,
    question_keywords: (keywordResearch.question_keywords || []).length,
    paa_count: (keywordResearch.people_also_ask || []).length,
    competitor_count: (keywordResearch.top_competitors || []).length,
    serp_result_count: (keywordResearch.serp_organic || []).length
  }
};

return { json: { ...d, content_brief: brief, content_brief_text: JSON.stringify(brief, null, 2), _phase: 'brief_built' } };

values.content:
=={{ `
You are an experienced SEO travel content writer writing for Taya Tourism.

Your task is to generate a high-quality SEO introduction section.

════════════════════════════
CONTENT CONTEXT
════════════════════════════

Primary Keyword:
${$json.primary_keyword}

Section Type:
${$json.section_type}

Language:
${$json.language}

Country:
${$json.country}

Target Audience:
${$json.target_audience}

Content Goal:
${$json.content_goal}

Word Count Target:
${$json.word_count}

Search Intent:
${$json.llm_decision.search_intent}

════════════════════════════
SELECTED KEYWORDS
════════════════════════════

${($json.llm_decision.selected_keywords || []).map(k => `- ${k.keyword}`).join('\n')}

════════════════════════════
REQUIRED TOPICS
════════════════════════════

${JSON.stringify($json.required_topics || [])}

════════════════════════════
FORBIDDEN TOPICS
════════════════════════════

${JSON.stringify($json.forbidden_topics || [])}

════════════════════════════
EXISTING PAGE CONTEXT
════════════════════════════

${$json.existing_page_scraped || 'Not provided'}

════════════════════════════
PEOPLE ALSO ASK
════════════════════════════

${JSON.stringify($json.content_brief?.people_also_ask || [])}

════════════════════════════
TOP COMPETITORS
════════════════════════════

${JSON.stringify($json.content_brief?.top_competitors || [])}

════════════════════════════
SERP INSIGHTS
════════════════════════════

${JSON.stringify($json.content_brief?.serp_organic || [])}

════════════════════════════
TAYA TOURISM BRAND VOICE
════════════════════════════

Voice: Professional, Clear, Trustworthy, Personal, Direct

Avoid: dream getaway, paradise awaits, world-class, hidden gem, ultimate guide, exclusive deal

Write like an experienced travel advisor helping real travelers make practical decisions.

════════════════════════════
RULES
════════════════════════════

- Write ONLY the intro content
- Naturally include selected keywords
- Match the search intent
- Avoid keyword stuffing
- Avoid forbidden topics
- Write in ${$json.language}
- Keep content close to target word count: ${$json.word_count} words MINIMUM
- Do NOT use markdown code blocks
- Return ONLY the final intro content
` }}
